commands.command: repeat preparation plus complete asset SHA-256 comparison
actionlint .github/workflows/*.yml; bash -n scripts/source-retention/*.sh; node --check scripts/source-retention/release-tools.mjs; git diff --check
GitHub Actions immutable source retention draft run 29697892648

acceptance_comparisons.observed: 14 lock references map to 12 deduplicated content-addressed objects with complete origin metadata
forced-boundary self-test produced five ordered parts and exact reconstruction; production ceiling is 1.9 GB

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: complete draft independently downloaded and verified
acceptance_comparisons.observed: hosted run 29697892648 downloaded the complete draft into a clean directory and reconstructed all 417,655,374 bytes; a separate macOS verification repeated the result

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: published tag, assets, checksums, provenance, and attestations are immutable
acceptance_comparisons.observed: repository immutable-release setting is enabled; owner-gated publication is pending

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: clean reconstruction without local or CI cache
acceptance_comparisons.observed: the hosted verifier used only freshly downloaded GitHub draft assets and a separate local GitHub download also reconstructed every retained object

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: ADR-0010 classification blocks mandatory replica triggers
acceptance_comparisons.observed: both sources explicitly classified; zero triggers; missing, extra, malformed, or triggered classifications fail preparation

failure_history.failure: An optional Ruby YAML validation command used a keyword unsupported by the system Ruby version.
failure_history.recovery: Reran the syntax check with the compatible API and used installed actionlint as the workflow authority.

failure_history.failure: Post-merge hosted draft run 29697620919 failed safely because the GitHub Actions token received HTTP 403 from the immutable-release repository setting endpoint.
failure_history.recovery: Permit only the reversible hosted draft to defer that administrative read; keep publication fail-closed unless a privileged owner token confirms the setting.

recovery_result.summary: All final local implementation and reconstruction checks passed.
